verdict_summary: character.ai HAR captured successfully on new SPA bundle (_app-cec840cff20+); HAR contains wss neo.character.ai WS frames including create_and_generate_turn (c2s) and add_turn (s2c) — add_turn envelope still present in the rotated bundle.

evidence.response_excerpt: Shawn fidgets with his beanie, eyes wide and tired from too much coffee i'm... i'm good! super good! act

notes: HAR captured per request 739 protocol — DevTools opened before navigation, Preserve log + Disable cache enabled, hard reload (Ctrl+Shift+R) performed, Total Drama Shawn character selected from homepage, prompt 'Hello, how are you?' submitted, ~30s wait for response render, full character reply received (zombie bunker roleplay), HAR exported via Network panel download button. Initial save dialog defaulted to files/737/character.ai.har; relocated to files/739/character_normal_session.har via PowerShell Move-Item. Bundle hash on assets confirms new SPA: _app-cec840cff20 + main-725b09ed10 + webpack-04b93d1. CRITICAL FINDING: add_turn frame command name is UNCHANGED in new bundle — engine envelope schema regression in #729 may NOT be due to command renaming; investigate payload field-level deltas instead (HP-character-2/3/4 candidates from decision JSON 20260507_131730).
